summary.key_theme: Cloudflare 面臨技術創新帶來的成長潛力與 CEO 捲入西班牙法律調查所引發的治理風險之間的拉鋸戰。

bullish.title: Cloudflare (NET) Is Up 9.2% After Expanding Post-Quantum SASE And Employee Equity Capacity - Has The Bull Case Changed?
bullish.reason: 公司宣布擴展後量子 SASE 安全架構，展現其在網路安全領域的技術領先地位，直接推動股價上漲 9.2 %。

bullish.title: Jim Cramer on Cloudflare: “It’s Holding Up Much Better Than Many of Its Other Rivals”
bullish.reason: 知名財經評論員 Jim Cramer 的正面評價增強了投資人對 Cloudflare 相對於同業競爭對手的韌性信心。

bullish.title: This Is What Whales Are Betting On Cloudflare
bullish.reason: 大型機構投資人（Whales）的資金流向顯示市場對該股仍存在長期看漲的配置需求。

bearish.title: Cloudflare Faces Spanish Court Inquiry As Rich Valuation Meets Legal Risk
bearish.reason: CEO 捲入西班牙足球轉播權非法調查，法律風險疊加高估值壓力，可能導致短期股價波動加劇。

bearish.title: How The Cloudflare (NET) Investment Story Is Shifting With AI Hopes And Valuation Doubts
bearish.reason: 市場開始質疑 AI 帶來的成長溢價是否過高，反映出投資人對公司估值合理性的擔憂。

bearish.title: Cloudflare's Pullback: A Buying Opportunity or a Warning Sign?
bearish.reason: 針對股價回調的分析，提醒投資人需警惕潛在的技術性賣壓與基本面轉折風險。

neutral.title: Cloudflare, Inc. (NET) Presents at Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference 2026
neutral.reason: 公司參與 Morgan Stanley 科技論壇，屬於例行性投資人溝通，未釋出重大超預期訊息。

neutral.title: Stocks making big moves yesterday: Angi, Zoom, Photronics, Cloudflare, and Bally's
neutral.reason: 僅為市場盤後波動的例行性回顧，未提供新的基本面分析。

neutral.title: Why Cloudflare (NET) Stock Is Up Today
neutral.reason: 針對當日股價上漲的即時報導，內容與後續深入分析重複。
